name: Chili Con Carrot
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all of the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Blend thoroughly until smooth and well combined.
3. Cover the mixture with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Serve chilled as a dip with suggested dippers such as Brussels Sprouts, Salami, or Cocktail Rye Bread.
